self = search_service = cart_service = query = 'Canon' @allure.title("Cart accepts product from search [{query}] – inline") @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL) @pytest.mark.parametrize("query", ["MacBook", "iPhone", "Canon"]) def test_cart_add_from_search_inline( self, search_service: SearchService, cart_service: CartService, query: str, ): with allure.step(f"Find first product ID for {query!r}"): LOGGER.info("Step: find product for %r", query) pid = search_service.first_product_id(query) with allure.step(f"POST product_id={pid} to cart"): LOGGER.info("Step: add product %s to cart", pid) resp = cart_service.add_product(pid) with allure.step("Assert 200 and cart is not empty"): assert resp.status_code == HTTP_OK, ( f"Expected {HTTP_OK}, got {resp.status_code}" ) cart_resp = cart_service.get_cart() > assert not cart_service.is_empty(cart_resp.text), ( f"Cart empty after adding product {pid!r} from query {query!r}" ) E AssertionError: Cart empty after adding product '30' from query 'Canon' E assert not True E + where True = >(' Shopping Cart Affiliate
